task: Browse apartments with at least 2 bedrooms and 2 bathrooms and a max price of $4000 per month.
graderReasoning: The agent completed the browsing task by reaching Craigslist’s SF Bay Area apartments search results with the correct filter URL: max_price=4000, min_bedrooms=2, and min_bathrooms=2. Although the browser crashed, the agent used webfetch on the exact filtered search page and extracted results from that page. The final response provided the search URL and multiple apartment listings with prices, areas, and links that are supported by the fetched Craigslist results. Since the task was to browse apartments meeting those constraints, presenting matching filtered results from the correct page satisfies the task.
final_result_response:
I found 312 SF Bay Area Craigslist apartment results using the filters: at least 2 bedrooms, at least 2 bathrooms, max $4,000/mo. The browser was down, so I used the saved Craigslist results file. Source page: SF Bay Area apartments/housing for rent. <citation refs="fetch_call_J5tz2rA91cPEileI5tX3HMnt|fc_050ffea63224fbb9016a0451b16a40819b8b219928d61a57e1#1">“Apartments / Housing For Rent in SF Bay Area”</citation>

Search URL: https://sfbay.craigslist.org/search/apa?max_price=4000&min_bedrooms=2&min_bathrooms=2

A few clear 2 bed / 2 bath matches:

| Price | Area | Listing |
|---:|---|---|
| $1,650 | Berkeley | [Fully Furnished 2 Bed / 2 Bath Summer Apartment Near UC Berkeley](https://sfbay.craigslist.org/eby/apa/d/berkeley-fully-furnished-bed-bath/7933978831.html) |
| $2,200 | Vallejo / Benicia | [Luxurious 2 bed / 2 bath available with convenient washer & dryer](https://sfbay.craigslist.org/eby/apa/d/vallejo-luxurious-bed-bath-available/7933928515.html) |
| $2,300 | San Leandro | [2 Bedroom 2 Bathroom](https://sfbay.craigslist.org/eby/apa/d/san-leandro-bedroom-bathroom/7933905644.html) |
| $2,312 | Hayward / Castro Valley | [Exceptional 2 BR/2 BA - Elevated Living Close To Everything](https://sfbay.craigslist.org/eby/apa/d/san-leandro-exceptional-br-ba-elevated/7933907451.html) |
| $2,495 | Walnut Creek | [Top floor 2 Bed/2Bath with Luxury Vinyl Flooring Throughout](https://sfbay.craigslist.org/eby/apa/d/walnut-creek-top-floor-bed-2bath-with/7927987602.html) |
| $2,608 | Fairfield / Vacaville | [Large Closets, Situated in Fairfield!, 2/bd 2/ba](https://sfbay.craigslist.org/eby/apa/d/fairfield-large-closets-situated-in/7931692093.html) |
| $2,743 | Hayward / Castro Valley | [Large pantry, Hayward CA, 2BD 2BA](https://sfbay.craigslist.org/eby/apa/d/hayward-large-pantry-hayward-ca-2bd-2ba/7933082569.html) |
| $2,795 | San Jose South | [Bright 2 Bed / 2 Bath Condo in Gated Community - In-unit laundry](https://sfbay.craigslist.org/sby/apa/d/san-jose-bright-bed-bath-condo-in-gated/7933963401.html) |
| $2,885 | Daly City | [Spacious 2 bedrooms 2 bathrooms apartment in Daly city](https://sfbay.craigslist.org/pen/apa/d/daly-city-spacious-bedrooms-bathrooms/7933973096.html) |
| $2,895 | Cambrian | [Upstairs 2BD/2BA Condo - Gated Cedar Terrace Community](https://sfbay.craigslist.org/sby/apa/d/campbell-upstairs-2bd-2ba-condo-gated/7933943515.html) |
| $3,100 | Sunset / Parkside | [Remodeled 2 Bedroom 2 Bath Unit](https://sfbay.craigslist.org/sfc/apa/d/san-francisco-remodeled-bedroom-bath/7932010994.html) |
| $3,295 | Cupertino | [2 BED 2 BATH, SPACIOUS APARTMENT](https://sfbay.craigslist.org/sby/apa/d/cupertino-bed-bath-spacious-apartment/7933302470.html) |

I’d double-check unusually low listings, since some Craigslist posts may be room shares or short-term sublets even when they appear in apartment search results.
